flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University-Bloomington fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Indiana University-Bloomington are 33% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.7k vs $48.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Indiana University-Bloomington rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (34.0k → 37.8k).
